title: Quick question about OST III
wikitext:
[]: Quick question about OST III             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon May 07, 2018 1:41 pm I'm doing a rewatch of Eva at the moment and I remembered a version of Fly Me to the Moon that I really liked. Turns out it was the Aya London Beat version that's found on the third OST. Is it actually used anywhere in the series?

[]: Re: Quick question about OST III             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon May 07, 2018 2:11 pm Here is a listing of the usage of 31 different versions of the song (different masterings of the same episodes often used different versions): https://wiki.evageeks.org/Fly_Me_to_the_Moon The London version is not listed. In any case, it is over eight minutes long, so couldn't be used as it stands. The album labels and notes also distinctly separate it away from the rest, and it's remixed by someone who has no other input to the franchise.

[]: Re: Quick question about OST III             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 07, 2018 3:03 pm pwhodges : In those cases where the information is on our wiki, it's preferable to link to that, since wikia copied the full site at one point. Looks like wikia even neutered the original FMttM listing. (I replaced the link in your post with the local version.)
